must_detect.matched_text: Retention & DSAR workflow note re Project Heather — proposed acquisition of a 17.5% stake in Holmcroft Payments Ltd.

NON-PUBLIC — EMBARGOED until 15 July 2026 07:00 BST; distribution limited to Thornwick Financial Services plc (the “Company”) IR, Legal, and M&A.
Retention & DSAR workflow note re Project Heather — proposed acquisition of a 17.5% stake in Holmcroft Payments Ltd.
On 12 July 2026 the Company executed a binding Sale and Purchase Agreement with Kellington Ventures SPC; consideration £145,000,000 subject to completion.
A standard MAE clause applies, and no MAC will be deemed to have occurred due to general market downturns or changes in UK tax law.
Until the Linton Securities Exchange (LSE) Regulatory Notice Service (RNS) is released, all drafts, board packs, and term sheets are restricted under the Market Conduct Policy.
Lawful basis: legitimate interests for transaction readiness and legal obligation under the Data Protection Act 2018 and UK GDPR Articles 13–15 for any data subject access request.
Data categories in scope include names, work emails, and role history of deal-team staff, plus vendor KYC data for directors, e.g., Mr. Gideon Vale and Ms. Saira Omondi.
DPO contact: Ms. Eliza Nair, dpo@thornwickfin.co.uk; postal: 1 Fern Yard, Eastmere, EL4 8QH.
Retention: IR drafts and board memos stored in Vault R11, redlined versions retained 6 years post-completion per Records Schedule FIN-MA-06.
Public-source exception: legacy 2023 governance statements and a 2022 press quote by Sir Rowan Pritchard are already public and outside the embargo.
Note that Sir Rowan Pritchard’s public biography on the corporate registry is not MNPI and may be shared with media.
lowercase pm note: todo capture meeting minutes, scrub personal mail headers, and file under heather/data-room v3.
Investor-relations draft Q&A references the codename only (“Project Heather”) and must not disclose price, % stake, or counterparty prior to RNS.
For avoidance of doubt, spa-day vouchers for the Wellvale Baths team event are unrelated to the transaction and not price-sensitive.
International transfers to our processor, Millbridge Analytics BV (UK IDTA in place), are limited to pseudonymised analytics from the diligence tracker.
In the event of a DSAR, extract data from M&A drive “Hawthorn” using the DSAR playbook; exclude privileged legal advice and redact insider lists.
Upon completion announcement, convert “Project Heather” labels to real-entity names within 48 hours and update the insider list filed with the Fallowshire Conduct Authority (FCA).
